mapper.insert: INSERT INTO places ( space_id, name, category, address, region, country, latitude, longitude, price_desc, price_min, price_max, currency, hours, thumbnail_url, source_url, source_platform, tags, menu, confidence, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{spaceId}, #{name}, #{category}, #{address}, #{region}, #{country}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{priceDesc}, #{priceMin}, #{priceMax}, #{currency}, #{hours}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{sourceUrl}, #{sourcePlatform}, #{tags, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.ArrayTypeHandler}, #{menu, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.ArrayTypeHandler}, #{confidence}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, space_id, name, category, address, region, country, latitude, longitude, price_desc, price_min, price_max, currency, hours, thumbnail_url, source_url, source_platform, tags, menu, confidence, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM places WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, space_id, name, category, address, region, country, latitude, longitude, price_desc, price_min, price_max, currency, hours, thumbnail_url, source_url, source_platform, tags, menu, confidence, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM places WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
